title: Verify user login to logout journey with EULA page
scenario: First-time user login-to-logout journey including EULA acceptance, update notification, and main menu navigation on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or cleared data).
2. Observe the EULA and Privacy Policy agreement screen.
3. Tap 'Accept' to agree to the EULA and Privacy Policy.
4. Observe the 'Up-to-Date' update notification page (if shown).
5. Tap 'Continue' or 'Next' to proceed past the update notification.
6. On the login screen, enter valid credentials and tap 'Log In'.
7. Observe the Home screen is displayed after successful login.
8. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) or profile icon to open the main navigation menu.
9. Verify the menu displays: Color Theme, About, General Settings, Account.
11. Tap 'Log Out' or 'Sign Out' on the Account screen.
12. Observe the login screen reappears and the login button displays 'Log In'.
13. Verify that the login button text has reverted to 'Log In' (not showing a logged-in state).
expected: User can complete the full login-to-logout journey: EULA is accepted, update notification is dismissed, login succeeds, main menu shows expected items, logout succeeds, and the login button reverts to 'Log In'.
